items.title: If Mark Williams' new contract with the Phoenix Suns follows the standard 8% raise structure, it will look like this:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
If Mark Williams' new contract with the Phoenix Suns follows the standard 8% raise structure, it will look like this:

26-27: $11.7M
27-28: $12.7M
28-29: $13.6M

Phoenix projects to be $5.1M under their second-apron hard cap. The Suns currently have all 15 standard roster spots filled.

items.title: The Sparks trail 63-39 against the Tempo at the half. This would be comeback of the year if they could get it done on the road without Kelsey Plum or Cameron Brink.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Sparks trail 63-39 against the Tempo at the half. This would be comeback of the year if they could get it done on the road without Kelsey Plum or Cameron Brink.

items.title: Halftime: Tempo 63, Sparks 39. Toronto got whatever shot they wanted, converting on 56% overall and knocking down 10 3s. Sparks shot 39%. Marina Mabrey scored 27 in the first half. Toronto almost equalized Los Angeles’ entire half (39) just with their first-quarter scoring (38).
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Halftime: Tempo 63, Sparks 39. Toronto got whatever shot they wanted, converting on 56% overall and knocking down 10 3s. Sparks shot 39%. Marina Mabrey scored 27 in the first half. Toronto almost equalized Los Angeles’ entire half (39) just with their first-quarter scoring (38).

items.title: Restricted free agent Mark Williams intends to sign a three-year, $38 million contract to return to the Phoenix Suns, sources tell ESPN. The deal is fully guaranteed for Williams, who averaged 11 points, 8 rebounds and 1 block in 23.6 minutes per game as the Suns starting center.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Restricted free agent Mark Williams intends to sign a three-year, $38 million contract to return to the Phoenix Suns, sources tell ESPN. The deal is fully guaranteed for Williams, who averaged 11 points, 8 rebounds and 1 block in 23.6 minutes per game as the Suns starting center.

items.title: Per source, the Hawks are picking up Mo Gueye's team option for the 2026-27 season.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Per source, the Hawks are picking up Mo Gueye's team option for the 2026-27 season.

@mikeascotto.bsky.social reported first.

No surprise whatsoever here, as this was the expected outcome given that it is a very cheap option at $2.4 million for a rotation-caliber player.

(June 29 was deadline)

items.title: The Atlanta Hawks have exercised their fourth-year, $2.41 million team option on Mouhamed Gueye for the 2026-27 season, league sources told HoopsHype. Gueye played in a career-high 77 games for Atlanta, averaging 4.4 points and 3.6 rebounds in 15.3 minutes per game last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Atlanta Hawks have exercised their fourth-year, $2.41 million team option on Mouhamed Gueye for the 2026-27 season, league sources told HoopsHype. Gueye played in a career-high 77 games for Atlanta, averaging 4.4 points and 3.6 rebounds in 15.3 minutes per game last season.

They only play 10 minute quarters in the @wnba.com.

items.title: The 38 points allowed by the Los Angeles Sparks in the first quarter tonight are the most they’ve allowed in any quarter since they gave up 40 to the Dallas Wings in the fourth-quarter on Aug. 25, 2024.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: The 38 points allowed by the Los Angeles Sparks in the first quarter tonight are the most they’ve allowed in any quarter since they gave up 40 to the Dallas Wings in the fourth-quarter on Aug. 25, 2024.

items.title: The Sparks trail the Tempo 38-24 after one quarter of play. LA has been unable to stop Marina Mabrey, who already has 19 points. On the bright side, Dearica Hamby has 12 points for the Sparks.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Sparks trail the Tempo 38-24 after one quarter of play. LA has been unable to stop Marina Mabrey, who already has 19 points. On the bright side, Dearica Hamby has 12 points for the Sparks.

items.title: Sparks trail Tempo 38-24 after one. Offensively, Los Angeles has looked mostly fine even without Kelsey Plum. The defense, however, is a problem. Marina Mabrey scored 19 points for Toronto, and the Tempo shot 65%, made 5 3s, and were 11-for-11 from the line.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Sparks trail Tempo 38-24 after one. Offensively, Los Angeles has looked mostly fine even without Kelsey Plum. The defense, however, is a problem. Marina Mabrey scored 19 points for Toronto, and the Tempo shot 65%, made 5 3s, and were 11-for-11 from the line.
